title: 😱 Scientists have created a compound that in the laboratory destroys...
title_en: 😱 Scientists have created a compound that in the laboratory destroys...
title_uk: 😱 Вчені створили сполуку, яка в лабораторних умовах руйнує...
description: 😱 Scientists have created a compound that in the laboratory destroys up to 90% of cells of one of the most aggressive types of cancer. Researchers from Florida A&M University tested an experimental compound against adenocarcinoma of the pancreatic ducts - one of the most dangerous types of cancer. The molecule inhibited the reproduction of cancer cells by approximately 90% even at low concentrations. She launched into them...
description_en: 😱 Scientists have created a compound that in the laboratory destroys up to 90% of cells of one of the most aggressive types of cancer. Researchers from Florida A&M University tested an experimental compound against adenocarcinoma of the pancreatic ducts - one of the most dangerous types of cancer. The molecule inhibited the reproduction of cancer cells by approximately 90% even at low concentrations. She launched into them...
description_uk: 😱 Ученые создали соединение, которое в лаборатории уничтожает до 90% клеток одного из самых агрессивных видов рака Исследователи из Florida A&M University протестировали экспериментальное соединение против аденокарциномы протоков поджелудочной железы - одного из самых опасных видов рака. Молекула подавляла размножение раковых клеток примерно на 90% даже в низких концентрациях. Она запускала в них...

title: Attack attack
description: The situation is really difficult. So much so that now we have to paint locomotives with camouflage paint. The second video shows the consequences of the Geranyu attack on a locomotive in the Dnipropetrovsk region.

title: Sumy: Casualties reported
description: Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga commented on the Russian attack on the city of Sumy, calling on partners to resolutely react and strengthen support for Ukraine. 💬 "Tonight, Russia dropped an aerial bomb on the center of the city of Sumy. At least four civilians were killed, among them a child. Another 33 people were injured, including seven children. Moscow stopped even pretending to distinguish...

At least four civilians were killed, among them a child. Another 33 people were injured, including seven children. Moscow stopped even pretending to distinguish...

Щонайменше четверо мирних жителів загинули, серед них – дитина. Ще 33 людини дістали поранення, зокрема семеро дітей. Москва давно перестала навіть удавати, що розрізняє...

title: Evacuation ordered
description: Happy National Police Day of Ukraine! 🇺🇦 Every day, police officers help victims of Russian attacks and are among the first to arrive at the sites of attacks together with rescuers, carry out the evacuation of civilians from frontline communities, fight crime and perform many important tasks. Thousands of policemen are part of combat units, where they protect our freedom with weapons in their hands. Thank you...
description_en: Happy National Police Day of Ukraine! 🇺🇦 Every day, police officers help victims of Russian attacks and are among the first to arrive at the sites of attacks together with rescuers, carry out the evacuation of civilians from frontline communities, fight crime and perform many important tasks. Thousands of policemen are part of combat units, where they protect our freedom with weapons in their hands. Thank you...

Тисячі поліцейських – у складі бойових підрозділів, де захищають нашу свободу зі зброєю в руках. Дякуємо...

title: Drone attack
description: GUR destroyed a Russian MiG-29 at the airfield "Belbek" in Crimea with a UAV strike. Also, an airfield launcher was destroyed. Losses are estimated in millions of dollars.

title: Mykolaiv: Casualties reported
description: There was a report by the Minister of Internal Affairs, Ihor Klymenko, regarding the tragic road accident in the Mykolaiv region. A truck and a minibus collided on the Mykolaiv-Odesa highway. Unfortunately, as of now, we know about twelve dead. My condolences to family and friends. Six people were injured. All necessary services are working at the scene of the accident: rescuers, police, doctors. Now the law enforcement officers...

description_uk: Була доповідь міністра внутрішніх справ Ігоря Клименка щодо трагічної ДТП в Миколаївській області. На трасі Миколаїв – Одеса зіткнулися вантажний автомобіль і мікроавтобус. На жаль, станом на зараз відомо про дванадцятьох загиблих. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Шість людей травмовано. На місці аварії працюють усі необхідні служби: рятувальники, поліцейські, медики. Зараз правоохоронці...

title: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity,...

description: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_en: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_uk: Украинские БПЛА вывели из строя уже 42,7% мощностей нефтепереработки рф, - Генштаб За последний месяц Силы обороны поразили 8 российских НПЗ и уничтожили или серьезно повредили более 60 резервуаров с нефтью и нефтепродуктами. С августа 2025 года ущерб российской нефтепереработке достиг $13,5 млрд.

title: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this...

description: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this war worked near St. Petersburg. Ukraine's defense forces hit the port's oil infrastructure, which earns money for the Russian war, and Kronstadt, an important military target, was also hit. The distance from the state border of Ukraine is more than 850 kilometers. Thank you to everyone who provides Ukraine with accuracy and fulfills our plan...
description_en: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this war worked near St. Petersburg. Ukraine's defense forces hit the port's oil infrastructure, which earns money for the Russian war, and Kronstadt, an important military target, was also hit. The distance from the state border of Ukraine is more than 850 kilometers. Thank you to everyone who provides Ukraine with accuracy and fulfills our plan...
description_uk: Цієї ночі наші українські далекобійні санкції проти Росії за цю війну спрацювали поблизу Петербурга. Сили оборони України уразили портову нафтову інфраструктуру, що заробляє гроші для російської війни, також були влучання по Кронштадту – важлива військова ціль. Відстань від державного кордону України – понад 850 кілометрів. Дякую всім, хто забезпечує Україні влучність та виконує наш план...

description: Fires reported at ferry terminal, airfield in Russian-occupied Crimea as Ukrainian strikes continue. title: Kyiv: Missile launch detected
description: Ukrainian missile strike on Russia's Belgorod disrupts power, water supply across city, official says. Ukraine launched an overnight attack on the Russian city of Belgorod and the surrounding region on July 4, striking key infrastructure and causing widespread blackouts, according to eyewitnesses and acting Governor Alexander Shuvaev.

Another 27 people were injured, six of whom were children. Many have serious injuries. During the day...
